judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong profitability and a reasonable forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 3.8%; next earnings 2026-07-27.
positives: Earnings growth 147.3% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 146.3% — consistent with strong recent performance.
Return on equity 52.5% — highly efficient capital utilization.
Forward P/E 23.26x vs trailing 42.34x — multiple compresses significantly on expected growth.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $441.33.
negatives: Price/Book 19.15x — valuation is on the higher side.
Debt/Equity 44.88% — leverage is present but manageable given cash flow.
Quick ratio 0.70 — liquidity could be tight if immediate obligations arise.

news.paragraph: Celestica (CLS) has no recent headlines to inform an options trade. The stock's price action will likely be driven by its upcoming earnings report on July 27th, where analysts expect strong growth. Traders should consider the implications of the high beta and the wide range of analyst targets when assessing potential volatility.
